name: yalc
description: Work with yarn/npm packages locally like a boss

subcommands.name: publish
subcommands.description: Copy all the files that should be published in remote NPM registry

options.description: Publish package to the store and propagate all changes to existing yalc package installations
Disable adding hash signature of all files when copying package content
Show included files in the published package
Do not resolve 'workspace:' protocol in dependencies

subcommands.name: push
subcommands.description: Publish your package to the store and propagate all changes to existing yalc package installations

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: Copy the current version from the store to your project

options.description: Add yalc package to dev dependencies

args.name: package
args.description: The package you want to add

subcommands.name: link
subcommands.description: Alterative to 'add', instead using local '.yalc' as symlink source

options.description: Run package manager's update command for packages

args.name: package
args.description: The package you want to remove

subcommands.name: clean
subcommands.description: Unpublish a package published with yalc publish

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.description: Show all packages to which chosen package has been added

subcommands.name: retreat
subcommands.description: Remove packages from project, but leave in lock file (to be restored later)
